title: QA & SECURITY AUDIT - START NOW
message: 🚀 START TESTING NOW - APPROVAL DUE AT 9 AM
test_phases: Phase 1: Functional testing - login, dashboard, graphs, model selector
Phase 2: Performance testing - <200ms response, load test 10+ users
Phase 3: Security testing - no console secrets, CORS, JWT, XSS
Phase 4: Final polish - mobile responsive, accessibility, edge cases
